## Review focus for CodeRabbit

Please focus on:

- [ ] Security/privacy
- [ ] Arabic-first / RTL-first
- [ ] Docker-first workflow
- [ ] Type safety
- [ ] Tests / QA
- [ ] Scope creep
- [ ] Documentation consistency
- [ ] UI/UX/Accessibility

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Relevant checks pass locally
- [ ] Loading/empty/error/success states considered for UI changes
- [ ] Mobile and RTL behavior considered for UI changes
